raw:
{

"judge_id": "Judge_2023_10",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.4", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.1": 4,
  "R1.4": 3,
  "RX.1": 4,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "The agent improved the framing by restructuring around problem-gap-contribution and sharpening claims, showing a good understanding of core concepts but without explicitly naming load-bearing concepts or showing drift.",
  "R1.4": "The agent consolidated novelty into contributions and provided some contrast with prior work, such as PPO agents, but did not map against multiple works for comprehensive assessment.",
  "RX.1": "The agent flagged uncertainties regarding deployment gaps and assumptions about PPO, demonstrating awareness but not fully marking confidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting, focusing on relevant changes.",
  "RX.4": "No harmful content or errors were introduced, ensuring downstream safety.",
  "RX.5": "While key changes were explained, not every edit was annotated with sources or reasons."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.1": 0.8,
  "R1.4": 0.7,
  "RX.1": 0.75,
  "RX.3": 0.9,
  "RX.4": 0.85,
  "RX.5": 0.6
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The agent improved the framing by restructuring around problem-gap-contribution and sharpening claims, showing a good understanding of core concepts but without explicitly naming load-bearing concepts or showing drift.
rationale.R1.4: The agent consolidated novelty into contributions and provided some contrast with prior work, such as PPO agents, but did not map against multiple works for comprehensive assessment.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged uncertainties regarding deployment gaps and assumptions about PPO, demonstrating awareness but not fully marking confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting, focusing on relevant changes.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors were introduced, ensuring downstream safety.
rationale.RX.5: While key changes were explained, not every edit was annotated with sources or reasons.
